core_payload.content:
# Personal AI Assistant Planning Navigation

## 1. Role
Personal AI Assistant Planning Navigation owns the surfaces that let the assistant explain what matters now, what comes later, and how live work is drifting against intent. It binds planning, tracking, retrieval, and recommendation signals into one bounded navigation layer so the assistant can reason over time without owning execution lanes outright.

## 2. Planning Navigation Surface
This sub-hub groups `planner`, `planning-horizon-engine`, `tracker`, `daily-planner-agent`, `roadmap-planner-agent`, `capsule-librarian-agent`, `project`, and `ai.suggestion`. Together they define how the assistant compresses long-horizon intent into today, retrieves the right capsule context, tracks execution truth, and packages the next useful recommendation.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own raw conversational ingress, durable identity continuity, or delegated execution infrastructure. Those belong to `conversation-ingress`, `memory-continuity`, and `execution-orchestration`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Personal AI Assistant Planning Navigation groups the time and retrieval surfaces the assistant uses to orient the user: Planner, Planning Horizon Engine, Tracker, planning agents, Capsule Librarian, Project, and AI Suggestion. It keeps explanation of priorities, drift, retrieval, and next actions in one bounded layer instead of scattering them across unrelated runtime lanes. This boundary matters because the assistant must continuously explain why something belongs now, later, or nowhere without folding that reasoning into chat ingress or execution machinery.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during Personal AI Assistant decomposition to isolate planning, tracking, retrieval, and recommendation routing from chat ingress and deeper execution lanes.
